line_merges.reason: Holt's Oliva Monticello page lists Double Toro (6x60) as a size of Monticello, not a separate line. Shared listing URL was the only signal for the false split.
Shared Holts Sanctum listing; Double is a longer 60-ring Gordo (60x216), not a separate line.
Shared Holts Serie 1968 listing; Double is 60x152 Toro size of the same line.
Shared Holts Viejo listing; Double is 60x152 Toro size of the same line.
Shared Holts Quorum Maduro listing; Double is a single Gordo (60x152) size of the same line.
Shared Holts Sam Leccia White listing; Double is 60x152 Toro size of the same line.
Shared Holts Exodus Gold 20th listing; Double is 60x152 Toro size of the same line.

vitola_relocations.reason: Melanio SKUs (and a Figurado whose product URL is melanio-figurado) were incorrectly attached to the Serie V line entry.

keep_distinct.reason: Distinct commercial lines: Serie V (sun-grown Habano) vs Serie V Melanio (Ecuador Sumatra, Gran Reserva). Prefix overlap only.
Flor de Connecticut / Corojo / Gold / Maduro / Original are separate wrapper/series lines under the Flor de umbrella.
Gilberto Reserva Blanc is a distinct Connecticut/blanc sibling, not a naming twin of Gilberto Reserva.
